message:
chore(aw): upgrade gh-aw v0.67.4 -> v0.68.1 (#6300) (#6303)

Nightly version check flagged gh-aw one minor version behind. Upgraded
the local extension, ran `gh aw compile`, and applied the post-compile
patch (.github/aw/patch-lock-files.sh).

Regenerated:
- .github/aw/actions-lock.json
- .github/workflows/{auto-triage,handle-complications,implement-fix,
  stuck-detection,verify-preview}.lock.yml

Only pins and generated YAML changed — the source .md prompts are
unchanged. `gh aw compile` reported 0 errors / 0 warnings.

Closes #6300

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
